mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order`(order_id, type, status, reward, time_limit, pickup_location, dropoff_location, remarks, creator_user_id, taker_user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{type}, #{status}, #{reward}, #{timeLimit}, #{pickupLocation}, #{dropoffLocation}, #{remarks}, #{creatorUserId}, #{takerUserId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, taker_user_id = #{takerUserId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
